race.comment: VALENTIAGO (8) thereabouts in tougher company on the provincial circuit and expected to get off the mark at start eleven. Sat on the good tempo with a narrow fourth over 1600m at Newcastle in a Super Maiden. Deep into the prep and should prove too strong for these. CASTRO (1) has yet to miss the top-three this time in, most recently coming from the tail of the field to miss by a head as runner-up at Dubbo. The longer trip should suit. MISS MAVERICK (10) has been within 0.7L of the winner when placed in the last four starts. Each way hope. MUIRISC (11) is working towards a win having placed in the last two outings.
